---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for CORE
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Provide a short description of the proposed feature.

---

## Research Problem

Describe the research problem that this feature aims to solve.

Why is this functionality needed?

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think the feature could work.

High-level ideas are sufficient.

---

## Expected Benefits

Describe the expected benefits for users or researchers.

Examples may include:

- improved reproducibility
- improved usability
- improved performance
- reduced manual review effort
- support for additional research domains

---

## Impact on Existing Workflows

Does this proposal affect existing CORE workflows?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes

If yes, please explain.

---

## Alternative Approaches

Describe any alternative solutions or approaches that were considered.

---

## Additional Context

Add any additional information that may help evaluate the proposal.
